testcases.input: n = 2 Output: ["1/2"] Explanation: "1/2" is the only unique fraction with a denominator less-than-or-equal-to 2.
testcases.expectedOutput: ["1/2"] Explanation: "1/2" is the only unique fraction with a denominator less-than-or-equal-to 2.

testcases.input: n = 4 Output: ["1/2","1/3","1/4","2/3","3/4"] Explanation: "2/4" is not a simplified fraction because it can be simplified to "1/2".
testcases.expectedOutput: ["1/2","1/3","1/4","2/3","3/4"] Explanation: "2/4" is not a simplified fraction because it can be simplified to "1/2".
